name: codex-paired-superpowers
description: Single-plugin marketplace for codex-paired-superpowers. The plugin and the marketplace catalog live in the same repository — adding this marketplace makes exactly one plugin (`codex-paired-superpowers`) available for install.

plugins.name: codex-paired-superpowers
plugins.description: Six superpowers skills paired with Codex (GPT-5.5) as an L11 engineering partner; one persistent Codex thread per feature; 7-round revision loop with structured verdict protocol. v0.10.0: implementer experts — parallel N-way fanout, merger + double-SHIP gate. v0.10.1: codex independently audits codebase against goals before SHIP — goals block + audit log + machine-enforced gate. v0.11.0: app-autopilot (experimental opt-in) — multi-plan rollout via /goal. v0.12.0: codex MCP runs with workspace-write sandbox so codex writes specs/plans directly; brainstorming defaults back to autopilot continuation (app-autopilot remains available as opt-in). v0.13.0: reliability fixes — Codex MCP pinned to gpt-5.5 with danger-full-access, code-bearing verification floor, thread-loss auto-recovery, atomic round+audit logging; autopilot is self-continuing (re-run /autopilot to resume; no ralph-loop). v0.14.0: hybrid dev mode (Claude inline UI + background Codex backend joined by a published contract); a single unified `execution` entry point — `/execute` with an explicit driver (interactive|autopilot) and per-slice split (single|two-disjoint|hybrid-ui-backend), `/autopilot` kept as a thin alias; reviewer-naming migration (review-sense "expert" → "reviewer") with full one-window back-compat; canonical docs/execution-model.md as the one driver/split/review mental model.
